sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 378 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2539/2025 2. For hearing of main case 15.12.2025 Mr. Ali Almani, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent As per joint request the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within 90 days. Learned counsel agree that no coercive action shall be taken against the applicant during pendency of the aforesaid proceedings and fate of the amount secured shall be subject to the outcome of the proceedings as aforesaid. This reference application stands disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
